items.headline: United States and Iran talks collapse without deal after marathon negotiations
items.body: Vice President JD Vance ended negotiations in Islamabad without agreement after Iran refused commitment to halt nuclear weapons development. Iran claims the United States abandoned diplomacy despite Iranian flexibility on core terms.

items.headline: Peru holds presidential election with record 35 candidates amid political fragmentation
items.body: The country votes for its ninth leader in nearly as many years with no candidate polling above 15 percent. A June runoff is inevitable as fury with the political class drives historic ballot crowding.

items.headline: Ecuador raises tariffs on Colombia to 100 percent as border security dispute escalates
items.body: Ecuador imposed what it calls a security tax over alleged failures to control drug trafficking at shared borders. Colombia matched the tariff rate and declared the effective end of the Andean Pact.

items.headline: Anthropic withholds AI model after discovering vulnerabilities across all major operating systems
items.body: The company's Claude Mythos Preview found high-severity security flaws in every major system and browser it tested. Access is restricted to 50 organizations with no public release planned due to exploit development risk.
